CONTENT.Career: Pröger made his professional debut for Mainz 05 II in the 3. Liga on 2 August 2014, coming on as a substitute in the 63rd minute for Marc Wachs in the 2–2 away draw against Fortuna Köln.In January 2019, Präger joined 2. Bundesliga side SC Paderborn 07 from fourth-tier Rot-Weiss Essen on a 2.5-year contract until 2021.After an extension until 2022, Pröger signed with Hansa Rostock in May 2022.In summer 2024, he joined SSV Jahn Regensburg.

SUMMARY: Kai Pröger (born 15 May 1992) is a German professional footballer who plays as a right winger for 2. Bundesliga club SSV Jahn Regensburg.
